description: Add multi-model batch evaluation capability: accept a --models flag with comma-separated model names, run evaluation for each model on the same dataset, output combined results with side-by-side comparison table showing accuracy, cost, latency per model.
command: Add multi-model batch evaluation capability: accept a --models flag with comma-separated model names, run evaluation for each model on the same dataset, output combined results with side-by-side comparison table showing accuracy, cost, latency per model.
